signals.headline: Kerala Assembly Election 2026 Polling Concludes | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Kerala Assembly Election 2026 Polling Concludes | NO | LOW confidence**

Polling for Kerala's 140 assembly seats ended on April 9, 2026, with 62.71% voter turnout recorded by 3 PM amid a tight race between LDF (seeking a third term), UDF (pushing for comeback), and NDA (aiming to break through); no results, winners, or seat projections confirmed yet, limiting market impact[4]. signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI: 2.16-2.2% YoY (up from 2.0% prior, below 2.3-2.4% consensus)** | YES | HIGH
